name: claude-code-spec-kit-subagent-plugin
description: A Claude Code plugin that provides a conversational, adaptive, and agentic subagent for co-creating rigorous, multi-perspective technical specs—featuring dynamic memory graphs, adaptive workflows, and explicit multi-role analysis. Especially useful for non-technical users and teams adopting the Spec Kit Methodology.
